monitor_the_situation.title: Israel Claims Killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei

— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 15m ago. Israeli Defense Minister Katz claims Israel assassinated Ali Khamenei, stating it was in response to his plans to destroy Israel and warning future Iranian leaders.
Israeli Forces Kill Child in Qalandia Camp, West Bank
— S3 · Conflict · Qalandia Camp, West Bank, Palestine · 8h ago. Israeli forces killed a child named Walid on the roof of his home in Qalandia refugee camp north of Jerusalem.
Baby Dies in West Bank After Israeli Forces Block Medical Care
— S3 · Conflict · West Bank, Palestine · 12h ago. A Palestinian infant died in the occupied West Bank after Israeli forces obstructed access to emergency medical care.
